source_text: The brakes aren't working! I can't stop the car!
target_text: బ్రేకులు పడటం లేదు! నేను కార్ ఆపలేకపోతున్నాను!
context_prev: We are heading down a very steep mountain road.
speaker: speaker_86

source_text: Look at this, we won the championship trophy!
target_text: इसे देखो, हम चैंपियनशिप ट्रॉफी जीत गए!
context_prev: The final whistle has blown, it is over!
context_next: I cannot believe all our hard work paid off.
speaker: speaker_16

source_text: He has a gun! Get down, hide behind the counter!
target_text: అతడి దగ్గర గన్ ఉంది! కిందకు వంగండి, కౌంటర్ వెనుక దాక్కోండి!
context_prev: Two masked men just walked into the bank vault.
context_next: Stay quiet, don't make any noise.
speaker: speaker_85
localization_notes: Gun is kept as గన్. Hide to దాక్కోండి.

source_text: It is a miracle, the doctor says he is out of danger!
target_text: यह एक चमत्कार है, डॉक्टर कह रहे हैं कि वह खतरे से बाहर है!
context_prev: The surgery took six long hours.
context_next: Thank God, our prayers have been answered.
speaker: speaker_18
localization_notes: Miracle translated to चमत्कार. High-intensity relief joy.

source_text: He usually prefers black coffee over tea.
target_text: वह आमतौर पर चाय की बजाय ब्लैक कॉफी पसंद करता है।
context_prev: Would you like something to drink?
speaker: speaker_08
localization_notes: Black coffee is used directly as is common in contemporary Hindi dialogue.

source_text: She reads the local newspaper every morning.
target_text: ఆమె ప్రతిరోజూ ఉదయం స్థానిక వార్తాపత్రిక చదువుతుంది.
context_prev: My mother keeps track of all neighbourhood news.
context_next: It is a habit she developed years ago.
speaker: speaker_56

source_text: My grandmother passed away quietly in her sleep last night.
target_text: మా అమ్మమ్మ నిన్న రాత్రి నిద్రలోనే ప్రశాంతంగా కన్నుమూశారు.
context_prev: She had been weak for the past couple of weeks.
context_next: She lived a long and beautiful life.
speaker: speaker_75
localization_notes: Passed away is respectfully translated to కన్నుమూశారు.

source_text: Oh my god! The box is completely empty!
target_text: हे भगवान! डिब्बा तो पूरी तरह से खाली है!
context_prev: We spent months searching for this treasure box.
context_next: Someone must have stolen the diamonds before us.
speaker: speaker_41
localization_notes: Oh my god to हे भगवान. Empty to खाली.

source_text: The train usually arrives at platform number four.
target_text: ट्रेन आमतौर पर प्लेटफॉर्म नंबर चार पर आती है।
context_prev: Which way is the ticket counter?
context_next: We have about twenty minutes left.
speaker: speaker_02
localization_notes: Platform number remains as platform number, standard in colloquial Hindi.

source_text: He usually prefers black coffee over tea.
target_text: అతను సాధారణంగా టీ కంటే బ్లాక్ కాఫీనే ఇష్టపడతాడు.
context_prev: Would you like something to drink?
speaker: speaker_58
